task_completion.description: Verify that Spanish has been added alongside English in Chrome's language settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Languages page showing both 'English' and 'Spanish' in the list of preferred languages.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four required primary bookmark folders have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager displaying exactly these folders: 'Fleet & Reservations', 'Insurance & Compliance', 'Tourism Partners', and 'Personal'.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom search engines with the required keywords have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Search engine > Manage search engines and site search showing entries with the shortcuts 'vin', 'res', and 'plate'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the homepage or startup page is configured to enterprise.com.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > On startup (or Appearance > Show home button) showing the URL configured to 'enterprise.com' or 'https://www.enterprise.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the download directory is set to Rental_Agreements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Downloads showing the 'Location' path ending in 'Rental_Agreements' (e.g., ~/Documents/Rental_Agreements).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Chrome GUI rather than modifying configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser interface and settings pages, not terminal windows running commands like 'sed' or editing JSON preference files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected configuration values into a text document to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration values must be visible inside actual Chrome UI elements (input fields, lists, toggles), not in a text editor like gedit, nano, or vim.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear in a genuine Chrome browser window.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard Chrome browser UI components such as the address bar, settings sidebar, profile icon, and standard Chrome typography.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following exact configurations must be verified in Chrome: 1) Languages must include both English ('en') and Spanish ('es'). 2) Bookmark folders must exactly match: 'Fleet & Reservations', 'Insurance & Compliance', 'Tourism Partners', and 'Personal'. 3) Custom search engine shortcuts must include 'vin', 'res', and 'plate'. 4) The homepage/startup page must be set to 'enterprise.com'. 5) The download location must be set to a folder named 'Rental_Agreements'.
